libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image/JDK 25 runs with io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, set native test runtime system properties equivalent to the existing 5.0.0 setup: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests can exercise normal usage by creating Vertx.vertx(), starting an in-process HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 with an ephemeral port, and using WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient against it; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient references the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless adding that dependency is intentionally in scope.
The unsafe-access properties are tied to the Java 25/Netty 4.2.x native runtime behavior, so local Gradle and Native Image verification should remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Core Vert.x Web Client coverage is reachable with its normal transitive dependencies and an in-process Vert.x HTTP server, but 5.0.1 still uses Netty 4.2.x and needs the same Java 25 native runtime unsafe-access properties already used for 5.0.0.
